allow: PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\kalle\\Desktop\\task-delegator\\frontend\\html\\calender.html"; $lines = Get-Content -LiteralPath $p; $out = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; $skip = $false; foreach \($l in $lines\) { if \($l -eq "======="\) { $skip = $true; continue }; if \($l -eq ">>>>>>> theirs"\) { $skip = $false; continue }; if \(-not $skip\) { $out.Add\($l\) } }; Set-Content -LiteralPath $p -Value $out -Encoding utf8; "done, lines: $\($out.Count\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; $log = "C:\\Users\\kalle\\Desktop\\task-delegator\\server.log"; Remove-Item -LiteralPath $log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $null = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\kalle\\Desktop\\task-delegator\\backend" -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput $log -RedirectStandardError "$log.err" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "started"; Get-Content -LiteralPath $log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($body = @{groupCode='10';title='X';description='y';type='learning';dueDate='2026-06-01';createdBy='test123'} | ConvertTo-Json; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:3000/sprints/newsprint -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\kalle\\Desktop\\task-delegator\\backend\\json\\sprints.json"; $sprints = Get-Content -LiteralPath $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $kept = @\($sprints | Where-Object { $_.id -ne 1779189024978 }\); $json = ConvertTo-Json -InputObject $kept -Depth 10; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $json, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); "kept $\($kept.Count\) sprint\(s\)")
